Monetize your single on social media?
	
Social Media Pack ($4.95/yr + 20% of platform ad revenue)
Get notified & paid when your music is used in content on YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook. We automatically detect matches and pay you ad revenue from videos that use your music.

Your music will be added to:

YouTube's Content ID, Creator Music, and Shorts music libraries.
TikTok's music ID recognition service.
Instagram monetization with Meta Rights Manager.
Facebook's recognition service using Meta Rights Manager.

Learn more about monetizing your music on social media.

Album cover
Select an image
Or drag image here to upload
💡 Recommended images are 3000x3000 square JPG format. This is just a recommendation though—we accept most image sizes.
💡 Stores will reject artwork that contains a website address (URL), X name, or any image that's pixelated, rotated, or poor quality. They'll also reject artwork with prices or store logos (don't put an iTunes or Spotify logo on your artwork). Also, please don't reuse the same artwork for multiple albums.
💡 You own this artwork and everything in it. Stores will reject your artwork if it contains images you found online that you don't have the explicit right to use.
Track 1
Song title
Just the title, no feat. artists or other info
💡 Don't include featured artists here. Add them below, instead.
💡 If a cover song, don't include original artist's name
💡 No year/dates. Do not include any year info (ex: 2026) in your song title.
